title: Docker Init
story: PID 1 in a container must properly handle signals and reap zombie processes. Use `--init` to run an init process as PID 1.
objectives: Confirm PID 1 is `docker-init` (tini), not the Node process directly
hints: `--init` injects a tiny init process (tini) as PID 1
The actual application becomes a child of PID 1
